title: ServeWorktree executor
description: Pick a git worktree (interactively, arrow keys + Enter) and run its serve target with the correct Nx workspace root, so an in-flight feature can be served from its own worktree without merging back.

project.description: Project whose serve target to run. Defaults to the project this executor target is attached to.

serveTarget.description: The target to run inside the chosen worktree.

worktree.description: Pre-select a worktree by branch name or path, skipping the interactive prompt (for scripting / non-interactive shells).

install.description: Run 'yarn install' in the chosen worktree when it has no node_modules (worktrees start empty).

dryRun.description: Print the resolved worktree and the command that would run, without installing or serving.
